<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk004.pdf#page=8 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p164 -->

<!-- header: HOHENPOLDING -->

<!-- header: HOHENPOLDING -->


[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img001.jpg|thumb|Taube im Glorienschein]]


Nördliche LHs-Wand, von W nach O


[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img006.jpg|thumb|Sonne und Mond a-f Loboreis Mariens aus dem Hohenlier]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p008_img007.jpg|thumb]]



== Südliche LHs-Wand, von W nach O ==


164
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p165 -->
